nasb.text: The sons of Naphtali according to their families: of Jahzeel, the family of the Jahzeelites; of Guni, the family of the Gunites;

esv.text: The sons of Naphtali according to their clans: of Jahzeel, the clan of the Jahzeelites; of Guni, the clan of the Gunites;

cnv.text: 拿弗他利的子孫，按著家族，屬雅薛的，有雅薛家族；屬沽尼的，有沽尼家族；

ccb.text: 拿弗他利的子孙有雅薛族、沽尼族、
